verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Tears, work, mourning, sad here below; But all is well. But all is well. I approach Canaan with each step; Yes, all is well. Yes, all is well. The world and its deceptive charm Vainly seek to hold my heart in its bonds I move forward in peace with my eyes On my Savior Yes, all is well, yes, all is well.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One more day, and I will reach the goal; Yes, all is well. Yes, all is well. And I will see the land of salvation; Yes, all is well. Yes, all is well. One more day, the world will pass O pilgrim, walk without tiring: Soon in God you will find rest. Yes, all is well. Yes, all is well.
